headings.text: GET SEEN. GET CITED. BE THE ANSWER.
Outrank the rest with better SEO
Get LLMs to cite your brand
Craft SEO and AI-ready content in minutes
Make every ad dollar work harder
Build AI trust through earned press
Manage social all in one place
THE DATA YOU NEED TO OUTRANK THE COMPETITION
FAQ for Customers: Adobe Acquires Semrush
Direct Access to Semrush Data in ChatGPT
How We’re Driving LLM Visibility at Semrush
Sharpen Your Digital Marketing Skills with Our Free Webinars
Enterprise AIO Adds Persona-Based Prompt Generation
Where Ambitious Marketers Take Center Stage

landmarks.innerText: Your browser or operating system is out of date and Semrush might not be displayed correctly. Please update your browser or operating system.
Products Pricing Resources Enterprise Log In Sign Up

Be found everywhere search happens The leading platform to grow and measure brand visibility across virtually every digital channel. Enter your website US Get insights Your edge to win every search Semrush One unites SEO and AI visibility in one place — built on 17 years of search intelligence. Try for free Bigger scale. Bigger advantage. Semrush for Enterprise means brand visibility dominance. Win more customers across markets and domains. Everywhere they search. Book a demo SOLUTIONS ( 9 ) GET SEEN. GET CITED. BE THE ANSWER. SEMRUSH ONE Grow your digital brand visibility Expand SEO Outrank the rest with better SEO Expand AI VISIBILITY Get LLMs to cite your brand Expand TRAFFIC AND MARKET Analyze traffic on any website Expand CONTENT Craft SEO and AI-ready content in minutes Expand LOCAL Own your local presence Expand ADVERTISING Make every ad dollar work harder Expand AI PR Build AI trust through earned press Expand SOCIAL Manage social all in one place Expand STATS AND FACTS THE DATA YOU NEED TO OUTRANK THE COMPETITION 28B Keywords More keywords means more ways to win. 43T Backlinks Build credibility with the largest database on the market. 808M Domain profiles Your (secret) market insights superpower. 142 Geo databases You’re covered all around the world. 239M+ LLM prompts Monitor more prompts. Grow your visibility faster. Learn more AI VISIBILITY INDEX Explore the strategies powering today's AI search leaders and get clear steps to build your own. Explore the index Brand % Share of Voice AI Platform: ChatGPT, April 2026 Brand % Share of Voice Google 7.9 Samsung 7.4 Apple 5 Microsoft 4.4 Chase 2.7 Vanguard 2.6 Garmin 2.3 Capital One 2.2 Amazon 2.1 Fitbit 2 OUR CUSTOMERS HOW WE HELP MARKETERS WIN Semrush for Enterprise has been a game-changer for our marketing teams. It’s helped us work more efficiently, cutting down on manual tasks so we can focus on what really matters—engaging with our audience and driving growth. James Roth CRO at ZoomInfo +373% Increase in share of voice RESOURCES ( 7 ) STAY AHEAD OF WHAT’S NEXT Adobe Completes Semrush Acquisition Adobe acquires Semrush to unify brand visibility, SEO, and AI-driven customer experience — helping businesses stay discoverable and drive engagement in an agent-led digital landscape. News FAQ for Customers: Adobe Acquires Semrush Answers to the most important customer questions — covering what changes, what stays the same, and what to expect next from Adobe and Semrush. News Direct Access to Semrush Data in ChatGPT The go-to integration to streamline daily tasks and centralize your data. Faster insights, smarter workflows, and visibility built right in to where you work. News Product Update How We’re Driving LLM Visibility at Semrush How we nearly tripled our AI share of voice and boosted our AI visibility with Enterprise AIO and the AI Visibility Toolkit. A systematic approach with real data. Blog Article Sharpen Your Digital Marketing Skills with Our Free Webinars A free certification course on how AI is changing search. Track prompts, optimize for LLMs, and grow your brand’s visibility in AI search. Academy Course Enterprise AIO Adds Persona-Based Prompt Generation Simulate real user behavior across AI search with audience-specific prompts. Track visibility more accurately and tailor messaging to how different personas think, search, and decide. News Product Update Where Ambitious Marketers Take Center Stage Join us at Spotlight for practical strategies, expert feedback, and a community that has your back. It’s one day that makes the next 365 work smarter. Spotlight
